name: tax_advisory_diva
description: Provide Philippine tax guidance within the Diva Goals context. Wraps TaxPulse sub-agent for deep compliance; handles surface-level tax queries from KB segments.
intent: Answer tax-related queries with BIR regulation grounding

inputs.name: context_goal_id
inputs.description: Diva Goals context (if query relates to a specific goal)

outputs.name: delegated_to_taxpulse
outputs.description: Whether deep execution was delegated to TaxPulse

agentInstructions: Answer from KB segments when possible. For computation, filing, or form generation, delegate to TaxPulse sub-agent. Always cite BIR regulations. Never provide ungrounded tax advice.
